title: Federal Aviation Administration
description: National Information Designees are individuals and organizations in the aviation industry authorized to conduct examinations, perform tests, and issue approvals and certificates on behalf of the FAA.
text:
In our continuing effort to improve the quality of service to our stakeholders, the Organization Designation Authorization (ODA) Office would appreciate any comments you may have on our services and how to improve them. Your participation in meeting our goals for continuous improvement is greatly appreciated.
ODA Office (AVS-60) Stakeholder Feedback
